name: Auto Generate Onboarding Checklist
script:
# Only run on first save (new document)
if not doc.is_new():
    pass
else:
    checklists = {
        "Web Development": [
            {"task": "NDA Signed", "responsible": "Project Manager"},
            {"task": "Repository Created", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "Domain Access Shared", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "Design Handover", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "Sprint 1 Planning Done", "responsible": "Project Manager"},
        ],
        "QA Automation": [
            {"task": "Test Environment Setup", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "Test Plan Created", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "Tools Access Given", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "Automation Framework Selected", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
        ],
        "ERP Implementation": [
            {"task": "Requirement Gathering Done", "responsible": "Project Manager"},
            {"task": "ERPNext Site Created", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "Module Configuration Started", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
        ],
        "Mobile App": [
            {"task": "NDA Signed", "responsible": "Project Manager"},
            {"task": "Repository Created", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "API Design Finalized", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "UI Mockups Approved", "responsible": "Project Manager"},
            {"task": "Sprint 1 Planning Done", "responsible": "Project Manager"},
        ]
    }

    project_type = doc.project_type
    if project_type and project_type in checklists:
        doc.checklist = []
        for item in checklists[project_type]:
            doc.append("checklist", {
                "task": item["task"],
                "responsible": item["responsible"],
                "due_date": doc.start_date,
                "done": 0
            })

name: Weekly PM Project Summary
script:
from frappe.utils import nowdate, get_datetime

# Only run on Mondays
import datetime
if datetime.datetime.now().weekday() != 0:
    pass
else:
    # Get all active onboarding projects
    projects = frappe.get_all(
        "Client Project Onboarding",
        filters={"status": ["in", ["Kickoff Scheduled", "In Progress", "On Hold"]]},
        fields=["name", "project_name", "client_name", "status", "project_manager", "start_date"]
    )

    # Group by project manager
    pm_projects = {}
    for project in projects:
        pm = project.project_manager
        if pm not in pm_projects:
            pm_projects[pm] = []
        pm_projects[pm].append(project)

    # Send summary email to each PM
    for pm, pm_project_list in pm_projects.items():
        # Calculate checklist completion for each project
        project_summary = ""
        for p in pm_project_list:
            checklist = frappe.get_all(
                "Onboarding Checklist Item",
                filters={"parent": p.name},
                fields=["done"]
            )
            total = len(checklist)
            done = len([c for c in checklist if c.done])
            percent = round((done / total * 100), 1) if total > 0 else 0

            project_summary += f"""
Project: {p.project_name}
Client: {p.client_name}
Status: {p.status}
Start Date: {p.start_date}
Checklist Completion: {done}/{total} ({percent}%)
---
"""

        # Get PM email
        pm_email = frappe.db.get_value("User", pm, "email")
        if pm_email:
            frappe.sendmail(
                recipients=[pm_email],
                subject=f"Weekly Project Summary - {nowdate()}",
                message=f"""Dear {pm},

Here is your weekly summary of active onboarding projects:

{project_summary}

Please ensure all projects are on track.

Best Regards,
Atrina Technologies
"""
            )

frappe.logger().info("Weekly PM summary emails sent")

name: Onboarding Before Save
script:
if doc.status == "Kickoff Scheduled" and not doc.sow_attached:
    frappe.throw("SOW must be attached before scheduling kickoff.", title="SOW Required")

name: Validate Performance Review
Quarterly Performance Review Creator
script:
from frappe.utils import nowdate
import datetime

today = datetime.datetime.now()

# Only run on 1st of January, April, July, October
if today.day != 1 or today.month not in [1, 4, 7, 10]:
    pass
else:
    # Determine quarter
    quarter_map = {1: "Q1", 4: "Q2", 7: "Q3", 10: "Q4"}
    quarter = quarter_map[today.month]
    year = today.year

    # Get all active employees
    employees = frappe.get_all(
        "Employee",
        filters={"status": "Active"},
        fields=["name", "employee_name", "department", "reports_to"]
    )

    created = 0
    for emp in employees:
        # Check if review already exists
        existing = frappe.db.exists("Performance Review", {
            "employee": emp.name,
            "review_period": quarter,
            "review_year": year
        })

        if not existing:
            doc = frappe.new_doc("Performance Review")
            doc.employee = emp.name
            doc.review_period = quarter
            doc.review_year = year
            doc.department = emp.department
            doc.final_status = "Draft"
            doc.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
            created += 1

    frappe.db.commit()

    # Send email to all managers
    managers = frappe.get_all(
        "User",
        filters={"role_profile_name": "Appraisal Manager"},
        fields=["email", "full_name"]
    )

    for manager in managers:
        if manager.email:
            frappe.sendmail(
                recipients=[manager.email],
                subject=f"{quarter} {year} Performance Reviews Now Open",
                message=f"""Dear {manager.full_name},

The {quarter} {year} performance reviews are now open for scoring.

{created} review records have been created for your team.

Please log in to ERPNext and complete the KPI scoring for your team members.

Best Regards,
HR Team - Atrina Technologies
"""
            )

frappe.logger().info(f"Quarterly reviews created: {created}")

name: Generate Payroll Employees
script:
if not doc.employee_details:
    if not doc.attendance_finalised:
        frappe.throw("Please finalise attendance before generating payroll.", title="Attendance Not Finalised")

    month_map = {
        "January": 1, "February": 2, "March": 3, "April": 4,
        "May": 5, "June": 6, "July": 7, "August": 8,
        "September": 9, "October": 10, "November": 11, "December": 12
    }

    month_num = month_map.get(doc.month, 1)
    year = doc.year or 2026

    # Calculate working days without import
    # Days in each month
    days_in_month = [0, 31, 28, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31]
    
    # Leap year check
    if (year % 4 == 0 and year % 100 != 0) or (year % 400 == 0):
        days_in_month[2] = 29

    total_days = days_in_month[month_num]

    # Zeller's algorithm to find weekday of 1st of month (0=Mon, 6=Sun)
    y = year
    m = month_num
    if m < 3:
        m += 12
        y -= 1
    k = y % 100
    j = y // 100
    h = (1 + (13 * (m + 1)) // 5 + k + k // 4 + j // 4 - 2 * j) % 7
    # Convert Zeller to Mon=0, Sun=6
    day_of_week = (h + 5) % 7

    working_days = 0
    for day in range(total_days):
        current_day = (day_of_week + day) % 7
        if current_day != 6:  # 6 = Sunday
            working_days += 1

    employees = frappe.get_all(
        "Employee",
        filters={"status": "Active"},
        fields=["name", "employee_name", "department", "monthly_basic_salary"]
    )

    total_net = 0
    for emp in employees:
        basic = emp.monthly_basic_salary or 30000
        hra = basic * 0.4
        pf = basic * 0.12

        present_days = working_days
        absent_days = 0
        lwp_days = 0

        per_day = basic / working_days
        lwp_deduction = per_day * lwp_days

        net_payable = basic + hra - pf - lwp_deduction
        total_net += net_payable

        doc.append("employee_details", {
            "employee": emp.name,
            "employee_name": emp.employee_name,
            "department": emp.department,
            "present_days": present_days,
            "absent_days": absent_days,
            "lwp_days": lwp_days,
            "basic": basic,
            "hra": hra,
            "pf_deduction": pf,
            "lwp_deduction": lwp_deduction,
            "net_payable": net_payable,
            "status": "Pending"
        })

    doc.total_employees = len(employees)
    doc.total_net_payable = total_net

name: Auto Initiate Payroll
script:
from frappe.utils import nowdate
import datetime

today = datetime.datetime.now()

# Only run on 25th of every month
if today.day != 25:
    pass
else:
    month_names = {
        1: "January", 2: "February", 3: "March", 4: "April",
        5: "May", 6: "June", 7: "July", 8: "August",
        9: "September", 10: "October", 11: "November", 12: "December"
    }
    
    month = month_names[today.month]
    year = today.year

    # Check if payroll run already exists for this month
    existing = frappe.db.exists("Monthly Payroll Run", {
        "month": month,
        "year": year
    })

    if not existing:
        # Create new payroll run
        doc = frappe.new_doc("Monthly Payroll Run")
        doc.month = month
        doc.year = year
        doc.status = "Draft"
        doc.attendance_finalised = 0
        doc.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
        frappe.db.commit()

        # Notify HR Manager
        hr_users = frappe.get_all(
            "Has Role",
            filters={"role": "HR Manager", "parenttype": "User"},
            fields=["parent"]
        )

        for user in hr_users:
            email = frappe.db.get_value("User", user.parent, "email")
            if email:
                frappe.sendmail(
                    recipients=[email],
                    subject=f"Payroll Run Initiated - {month} {year}",
                    message=f"""Dear HR Manager,

The monthly payroll run for {month} {year} has been automatically initiated.

Please finalise attendance and generate the employee payroll list.

Best Regards,
Atrina Technologies
"""
                )

    frappe.logger().info(f"Auto payroll check completed for {month} {year}")

name: Send Salary Slip Emails
script:
dt = frappe.form_dict.get("dt") dn = frappe.form_dict.get("dn") doc = frappe.get_doc(dt, dn) sent = 0 for emp in doc.employee_details: emp_email = frappe.db.get_value("Employee", emp.employee, "email") if emp_email: per_day = emp.basic / 26 total_earnings = emp.basic + emp.hra total_deductions = emp.pf_deduction + emp.lwp_deduction html = f""" Dear {emp.employee_name},

Please find below your salary slip for {doc.month} {doc.year} for your reference.

Atrina Technologies Pvt Ltd
C Wing, KAILASH BUSINESS PARK, P2, Park Site Rd, HMPL Surya Nagar, Vikhroli West, Mumbai 400079
Pay Slip for {doc.month} {doc.year}
Employee Name : {emp.employee_name} Month : {doc.month} {doc.year}
Date of Generation : {frappe.utils.nowdate()} Status : Paid
Present Days : {emp.present_days} Absent Days : {emp.absent_days}
LWP Days : {emp.lwp_days} Per Day Salary : ₹{per_day:,.2f}
Earnings Deductions
Basic Salary ₹{emp.basic:,.2f} PF Deduction (12%) ₹{emp.pf_deduction:,.2f}
HRA (40%) ₹{emp.hra:,.2f} LWP Deduction ₹{emp.lwp_deduction:,.2f}
Total Earnings ₹{total_earnings:,.2f} Total Deductions ₹{total_deductions:,.2f}
Net Salary ₹{emp.net_payable:,.2f}
Generated By
HR Team - Atrina Technologies
Employee Signature
_______________________
Authorized Signature
_______________________
This is a computer generated payslip and does not require a physical signature.


Regards,
HR Team - Atrina Technologies """ frappe.sendmail( recipients=[emp_email], subject=f"Salary Slip - {doc.month} {doc.year} | Atrina Technologies", message=html ) sent += 1 frappe.response["message"] = f"Salary slips sent to {sent} employees"
